title: Calendar available
summary: CIRI is distributing its annual calendar featuring original photography and design for use on mobile phones and desktops. Visit CIRI’s website download a calendar today! The post Calendar available first appeared on CIRI .

title: New Author
summary: CIRI shareholder Joseph Robertson has written a book scheduled for release on Jan. 12, 2011. The book, My Daily Vibe: Meditation for Living Clean, contains 366 rhymes and meditations for addicts who are in recovery. The book will be available in local bookstores. title: CIRI Alaska Tourism Job Fair
summary: CIRI Alaska Tourism will hold a job fair on Monday, Jan. 10, 2011, from 11 a.m. to 3 p.m. The job fair will take place in the Cook Inlet Tribal Council Nat’uh building located at 3600 San Jeronimo Drive in east Anchorage. summary: When you apply online for your 2011 Permanent Fund Dividend, the Pick.Click.Give program makes it easy to give to your favorite Alaska nonprofits. Through the Pick.Click. title: CIRI shareholder new president and CEO of First Alaskans Institute
summary: CIRI shareholder Denise Morris is now the president and chief executive officer of First Alaskans Institute. She leaves the Alaska Native Justice Center, a CIRI nonprofit, where she served as president and chief executive officer since 1999. First Alaskans Institute is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organiza...

title: CIHA redeveloping Loussac Manor
summary: Cook Inlet Housing Authority (CIHA) has been selected by the Alaska Housing Finance Corp. (AHFC) for the $35 million redevelopment of Loussac Manor. summary: CIRI shareholder Dick Weldin’s construction company, Weldin Construction Inc., has been winning a steady stream of awards since it opened for business in 1991. title: Shareholders to receive 1099s for taxes in January
summary: After Dec. 31, CIRI’s accounting and finance department will be able to determine the proper treatment of the various types of distributions CIRI made to shareholders in 2010 with respect to IRS 1099 reporting requirements. title: 2011 dividend payments
summary: CIRI’s dividend policy states that the total CIRI dividend payment to shareholders in any given year is equal to 3.50 percent of the total shareholders’ equity, calculated as of Dec. 31 of the prior year. The CIRI Board is expected to set the dates of record for 2011 shareholder distributions in lat...

summary: The CIRI Nominating Committee is seeking CIRI shareholders interested in being considered for nomination for the 2011 CIRI Board of Directors’ slate of candidates. title: North Wind Inc. pairs with company to combine expertise and technology
summary: North Wind Inc., a CIRI company, recently entered into a strategic business alliance agreement with Thermal Remediation Services Inc., a Longview, Wash.-based company. title: Fireweed Theatre acquisition
summary: CIRI Land Development Co. (CLDC) acquired full ownership of the site of the former Fireweed Theatre in late November. CLDC plans to develop the 8.36-acre site into office space. The post Fireweed Theatre acquisition first appeared on CIRI .

title: CIRI closures
summary: CIRI will be closed in observance of the upcoming holidays: New Year’s Eve: Friday, Dec. 31, 2010 New Year’s Day: Monday, Jan. 3, 2011 The post CIRI closures first appeared on CIRI .

title: Committee looks ahead to 40th anniversary of ANCSA
summary: The 40th anniversary of the Alaska Native Claims Settlement Act (ANCSA) is fast approaching. Dec. 18, 2011 will mark 40 years since the landmark legislation was passed on Dec. 18, 1971. summary: PetSmart and Red Robin have opened their doors at Tikahtnu Commons, a CIRI and Browman Development Co.-owned entertainment shopping district in east Anchorage.
